nodes.name: Cron 07:30 L-V
nodes.notes: Lunes a viernes a las 07:30. Ajustar zona horaria a Bogotá (UTC-5) en la instancia n8n.

parameters.query:
-- Resumen del día anterior y estado MTD
WITH ayer AS (
  SELECT CURRENT_DATE - 1 AS fecha_ayer
),
ejecucion_ayer AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(SUM(t.costo_total), 0) AS total_ayer
  FROM opex_transactions t, ayer
  WHERE t.fecha_tx = ayer.fecha_ayer
),
ejecucion_mtd AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(SUM(t.costo_total), 0) AS total_mtd
  FROM opex_transactions t
  WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t.fecha_tx) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
    AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM t.fecha_tx) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE)
),
budget_mes AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(SUM(b.monto_budget), 0) AS budget_total
  FROM opex_budget b
  WHERE b.anio = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
    AND b.mes = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE)
    AND b.zona IS NULL
    AND b.contratista_id IS NULL
),
alertas_hoy AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE a.severidad IN ('alta','critica') AND a.estado = 'open') AS altas_criticas_abiertas,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE a.severidad = 'media' AND a.estado = 'open') AS medias_abiertas,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE a.estado IN ('resolved','false_positive')
      AND a.resuelta_en >= CURRENT_DATE - 1) AS cerradas_ayer
  FROM opex_alerts a
  WHERE a.generada_en >= CURRENT_DATE - 7
),
top_desviaciones AS (
  SELECT
    a.contratista_nombre,
    a.zona,
    a.codigo_alerta,
    a.delta_pct,
    a.narrativa_corta,
    a.severidad
  FROM opex_alerts a
  WHERE a.estado = 'open'
    AND a.severidad IN ('alta','critica')
  ORDER BY ABS(a.delta_pct) DESC NULLS LAST
  LIMIT 3
),
forecast_hoy AS (
  SELECT
    proyeccion_central,
    budget_mes,
    desviacion_pct,
    nivel_confianza
  FROM opex_forecasts
  WHERE anio = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
    AND mes = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE)
  ORDER BY fecha_calculo DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  e_ayer.total_ayer,
  e_mtd.total_mtd,
  b.budget_total,
  CASE WHEN b.budget_total > 0 THEN
    ROUND(((e_mtd.total_mtd - b.budget_total) / b.budget_total) * 100, 1)
  ELSE NULL END AS desviacion_mtd_pct,
  al.altas_criticas_abiertas,
  al.medias_abiertas,
  al.cerradas_ayer,
  f.proyeccion_central,
  f.desviacion_pct AS forecast_desviacion_pct,
  (
    SELECT json_agg(t ORDER BY ABS(t.delta_pct) DESC NULLS LAST)
    FROM top_desviaciones t
  ) AS top_desviaciones_json
FROM ejecucion_ayer e_ayer
CROSS JOIN ejecucion_mtd e_mtd
CROSS JOIN budget_mes b
CROSS JOIN alertas_hoy al
LEFT JOIN forecast_hoy f ON true;

meta.notes: Resumen ejecutivo diario en Slack. Ejecuta lunes a viernes a las 07:30 (hora Bogotá). Usa HTTP Request a chat.postMessage porque el nodo Slack v2.2 no acepta arrays dinámicos en blocksUi. Credencial Header Auth account 12 tiene 'Authorization: Bearer xoxb-...' del Bot Token.
